home.title: Eastern Ethiopia’s trusted marketplace

auth.toggleSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.title: Choose your delivery zone
onboarding.subtitle: We use this to show accurate fees across the Eastern Triangle.

shops.browseSubtitle: Choose your city or corridor, pick a shop you trust, then explore their shelves — the way buyers move through Eastern Ethiopia’s markets.
shops.noProductsYet: This shop has no products listed yet.
shops.emptyArea: No shops in this area yet.
shops.emptyAreaHint: Try another city or pick “All areas”.

checkout.title: Pay with Chapa
checkout.testBanner: Use Chapa test keys — follow Chapa test-mode rules
checkout.mpesaEtbNote: Order total in ETB is sent to M-Pesa STK (Safaricom Ethiopia sandbox).
checkout.chapaNote: You will complete payment on Chapa’s secure page (cards, Telebirr, M-Pesa, etc.). Amount is your cart total in ETB.
checkout.chapaFailed: Payment was not completed. You can try again from your cart.

assistant.title: Shop Assistant
assistant.welcome: Ask me anything about products, prices, shops, or delivery in your language.
assistant.placeholder: Ask in English, አማርኛ, or Afaan Oromoo…

suggested.en: What’s the cheapest textbook in Harar?

demoFlow.title: Guided demo flow
demoFlow.completeSummary: You’ve walked the full trust loop: stats, dispatch, payment intent, OTP release, and admin revenue — in under five minutes.

steps.title: Seller dispatch
steps.body: Mark a pre-seeded PAID escrow order as dispatched.

pitch.hint: Use ← → or swipe · Esc to exit focus

slides.title: The problem
slides.body: Shops are invisible. Buyers travel hours. Sellers can’t scale. Runners lack structured work. Payments get scammed and goods don’t arrive. There is no trust.

slides.title: The solution
slides.body: Misrak Shemeta: the trust layer connecting buyers, sellers, and runners across Eastern Ethiopia — with escrow-protected M-PESA and a 24/7 multilingual AI assistant.

slides.title: Market size
slides.body: 3M+ people across Harar, Dire Dawa, Haramaya, Aweday, and surrounding areas.

slides.title: Technology
slides.body: Supabase · Google Gemini 1.5 Flash · M-PESA Daraja · Next.js PWA — fast, inclusive, investor-grade.

slides.title: Live traction
slides.body: Real listings, real checkout flow, real role separation — watch the stats update live.

slides.title: Team & contact
slides.body: Misrak Shemeta — Eastern Ethiopia Regional Marketplace. Let’s build trust at scale.
